home.title: PerkX | Maximize Your Trading Rebates
home.description: Maximize your trading rebates on global exchanges with PerkX. A professional cashback platform built for high-volume traders.
home.og_description: Earn cashback on every trade. Join thousands of professional traders using PerkX to boost their trading rewards.

home.hero_section_description: We get the best fee rebates, airdrops, and discounts into one portal — because every trade deserves the best deal.
home.how_perkx_works_description: Get started in three simple steps and start earning cashback on your trades
home.timeline2_desc: Create exchange account via link provided
home.calculator_desc: Calculate your potential cashback earnings based on your trading volume.
home.partner_exchanges_desc: Direct partnerships offering the industry’s highest verified rebate rates.

footer.desc: The global standard for crypto trading cashback. Helping institutional and retail traders maximize capital efficiency.

login.desc: Enter your email and password to sign in!

register.title: Create Your Account
register.desc: Start your crypto affiliate journey today.

verify_email.title: Verify Your Email
verify_email.desc: Please check your inbox to active your account.
verify_email.desc_otp: A 6-digit verification code has been sent to your email.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.desc: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.desc: Enter your new password to reset!

validate.password_min_8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validate.password_invalid_format: Password needs to be a minimum of 8 characters, 1 number, and 1 uppercase letter.
validate.confirm_password_string: Confirm password must be a string.
validate.password_not_match: Password and confirm password do not match.
validate.referral_string: Referral code must be a string.
validate.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

message.email_not_verified: Email does not exist or already verified
message.resend_email_success: Verification email has been resent successfully. Please check your inbox.
message.resend_email_failed: Failed to resend the verification email. Please try again later.
message.account_banned: Your account is banned, please contact to admin for support
message.verify_otp_failed: The verification code is invalid. Please try again.
message.resend_otp_success: Your new verification code is on the way. Please check your inbox.
message.resend_otp_failed: Something went wrong while resending your code. Please try again.
message.forgot_email_success: Password recovery email has been sent successfully. Please check your inbox (including Spam).
message.forgot_email_failed: Failed to send password recovery email. Please verify your email address or try again later.
message.reset_password_success: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
message.token_invalid: This reset token is invalid. Please request a new password reset.
message.token_expire: This reset token has expired. Please request a new password reset.
